ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "date_of_first_purchase" TEXT /* Date of the user's first purchase */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Current subscription status of the user */,
  "new_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's subscription was updated or changed */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the user accesses the service from */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of user acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category to which the video belongs */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the video */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the video */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the video */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the video */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the video */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video's thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES video_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES video_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_instances" (
  "watch_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch instance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user watching the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being watched */,
  "watched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the video was watched */,
  "watched_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds that the video was watched */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video was watched to completion */,
  "watched_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the video that was watched */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for watching the video */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the watch session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_instances_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_instances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Preferred video category */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Preferred video type */,
  "preference_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the user's preference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current subscription status */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was canceled */,
  "next_billing_date" TEXT /* Next billing date for the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the video category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the video type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended video */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each A/B test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the A/B test */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the A/B test */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the A/B test */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the A/B test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Group type for the test */,
  "test_url" TEXT /* URL or identifier for the test elements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test group */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the A/B test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the test group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of users in the test group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the test group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_groups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_groups_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES ab_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the A/B test */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the A/B test for the user */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Quantitative score of user engagement during the test */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Qualitative feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES ab_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
